creator: araujobsdport@gmail.com
text:
Paul Schmehl wrote:
> I'm confused.  I sent you a number of patches.  Are you saying that I
> should submit one patch for the entire port?  That one of the patches
> I submitted is bad?  They're all bad?
>
Hi dear Paul,
You sent the update in separated files for us is very hard to apply this
type of patch, I need that you unify the files in a single patch, you
can see how make it at:
http://sce-tindy.tecnik93.com/FreeBSD/How-to-submit-a-diff.txt
Follow the steps included in this howto.
If you have some doubts how makes it please tell me.

Kind Regards,

-- 
Marcelo Araujo            (__)
araujo@FreeBSD.org     \\\'',)
http://www.FreeBSD.org   \/  \ ^
Power To Server.         .\. /_)
